# /tdd

> Synthesis step. Reads `inventory.json` + all per-artifact docs; emits `docs-generated/technical/technical-overview.md` per [`templates/synthesis/technical-overview.template.md`](../../templates/synthesis/technical-overview.template.md).

## Usage

```
/tdd [--project <name>]
```

## Pre-conditions

- `/scan` has emitted `inventory.json`
- `/document` has rendered per-artefact docs (the heavy step)

## Inputs

- `_brownfield/inventory.json`
- `_brownfield/docs-generated/technical/**` (per-artifact docs)
- `templates/synthesis/technical-overview.template.md`

## Execution flow

1. Load inventory + per-artifact docs
2. Build §1 entity table: top-20 by attribute count, with plugin-step / form / cross-ref counts
3. Build §2 code surface tables: plugins, CWA, JS web resources, X++ classes, Azure Functions
4. Build §3 UI surface counts: forms / views / charts / dashboards / Canvas screens / Pages
5. Build §4 process automation counts: workflows / BPFs / flows / business-rules
6. Build §5 security surface: role count + FLS profile count + privileges granted
7. Build §6 integration surface: counts per pattern category
8. Build §7 reporting surface: dataset / dataflow / report counts
9. Mechanically observe technical decisions (citing ADR patterns across docs) and aggregate § 8
10. Detect test files alongside source (X++ unit-test classes, JS unit tests, .csproj test projects) → §9
11. Run global validators (`validate_evidence_chain`, `validate_no_grouping`)
12. Write `_brownfield/docs-generated/technical/technical-overview.md`

## Output

- `projects/{p}/_brownfield/docs-generated/technical/technical-overview.md`

## See also

- [`templates/synthesis/technical-overview.template.md`](../../templates/synthesis/technical-overview.template.md)
